Localization.Description: The Excel DCOM component was used to start processes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Excel DCOM component was used to start process {object.process.name} on behalf of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The Excel DCOM component was used to start processes on behalf of the user with ID {subject.account.id} on host {event_src.host}
